narrative:
Precinct Henrietta #1 (precinct in Lorain County) has 663 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.1 percentage points.
